_comment: Copy to config.json (same folder) and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored.

azureDevOps._orgUrl_onprem: For Azure DevOps Server (on-prem) use https://<server>/<collection> instead, and lower apiVersion if needed.

agent._comment: Which headless AI CLI gate.ps1 spawns when there is work. Invoked as: command + args (each arg has {prompt} substituted with the prompt below). Omit this whole block to use the Claude Code default. Only affects gate.ps1 - the interactive /pr-review and /loop modes are Claude Code. Whatever CLI you use MUST run non-interactively and auto-approve tool use (headless cannot answer prompts), so include that flag in args.
agent._other_cli_examples: See README 'Using a different agent CLI'. Illustrative templates (CONFIRM flags against your CLI's --help; the auto-approve flag name changes between versions): Gemini CLI -> command 'gemini', args ['-p','{prompt}','--yolo']; GitHub Copilot CLI -> command 'copilot', args ['-p','{prompt}','--allow-all-tools']. For any non-Claude CLI, also set prompt to a self-contained instruction (see README) since '/pr-review' is a Claude Code slash command.
